title: spiranthes cernua subsp. odorata
intro: Spiranthes cernua subsp. odorata, also known as the Fragrant Ladies' Tresses, is a type of orchid native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. The Fragrant Ladies' Tresses can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and folk medicine.
